response.justification: Bogdan has solid breadth as a polyglot engineer with 17+ years of experience and genuine entrepreneurial spirit through GISCollective and community workshop leadership, but falls well short of the Principal/Director-level AI strategy profile this role demands. His AI exposure is limited to roughly one year of MCP tooling work at his current job, with no demonstrated track record of building AI products at scale, advising enterprise customers on AI adoption, or shaping cloud strategy at an organizational level. The preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field is absent, and there is no evidence of the executive-level influence, recognized AI thought leadership, or deep cloud platform expertise required for a director-level IC role.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, clearing the minimum tenure bar
Entrepreneurial mindset demonstrated through founding GISCollective and shipping multiple open-source libraries and platforms
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling, showing directional alignment
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (~1 year), with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at meaningful scale
No evidence of director-level strategic influence, executive or customer advisory relationships, or cross-organizational cloud/AI strategy ownership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no recognized public thought leadership in AI or cloud strategy beyond niche open-source communities

key_factors.factor: Director-level seniority and strategic scope gap
